meaning: vt.废止,废除(法律、制度、习俗等)
examples: These reforms will abolish racially discriminatory laws.
An Illinois House committee voted Thursday to abolish the death penalty.
He took the first step to abolish slavery in America.
According to the convention, contracting parties are required to abolish any discriminatory policies in the field of education.
Ministers also plan to abolish the dual mandate that allows AMs to sit as MPs.
